data.title: Dickey's Barbecue Pit launches Fully Loaded Fridays: Buy One, Get One giant loaded bakers until Jan 31.
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit® is making Fridays more convenient with Fully Loaded Fridays promotion, offering a Buy One, Get One Free deal on their Giant Loaded Baker. This offer, available until January 31, includes the popular dish filled with pit-smoked meats and traditional Dickey’s sides. The Giant Baker provides a substantial meal option for a comforting Friday dinner and an effortless lunch for the following day. With winter approaching, customers are seeking hearty and fulfilling dishes, making this promotion perfect for those looking for a satisfying meal.

data.title: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh offers some of the safest used small SUVs on the market in 2026.
data.description: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh, N.C., announced on Jan. 21, 2026, that they are showcasing a range of used small SUVs, known for being among the safest vehicles in their category. Several models have received top safety ratings, making them a reliable option for buyers looking for secure transportation.

data.title: Rezolve Ai secures $250M financing, strengthens balance sheet for growth through M&A and enterprise scaling.
data.description: A recent capital raise has equipped the Company with the resources to fast-track mergers and acquisitions, expand enterprise deployments, and capitalize on sustained revenue growth from the adoption of AI technology. This strategic move will enable the Company to leverage significant funds for future ventures, including increasing M&A activity and expanding enterprise installations to drive revenue growth through AI adoption.

data.title: Investment firm F/m Investments files SEC application for tokenized shares in ETF; $18 billion assets; first of its kind.
data.description: An investment firm, F/m Investments, with assets totaling $18 billion, has submitted an exemptive application to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) requesting approval to document ownership of tokenized shares in the F/m US Treasury 3 Month Bill ETF (TBIL) on a permissioned blockchain ledger. This move marks a significant step as it is the initial application of its kind by an ETF issuer seeking SEC dispensation for tokenized shares of a registered investment company. The firm believes that tokenization is the future of investment.

data.title: Veridas protects mobile connections for 100M Mexicans under new regulation linking phone numbers to IDs.
data.description: In Mexico City, a significant development took place on January 9 with the implementation of new Guidelines for the Identification of Mobile Telephone Lines, aimed at enhancing digital identity and combating fraud within the country. The regulation mandates that all operators must associate each mobile phone line with a verified official identity. As a result, Veridas, a renowned figure in identity and cybersecurity on a global scale, has positioned itself as the key technological collaborator for the telecommunications sector. This partnership underscores the commitment to implementing secure measures, with the potential to impact a substantial number of mobile phone users across the nation.

data.title: AAVE price set to reach $190-195 by February 2026, despite short-term bearish signals at $155 support.
data.description: Analysts have diverse predictions for AAVE's price, estimating a target range of $190-195 by February 2026. However, the current technical indicators are advising caution, particularly around the $155 support levels.

data.title: Leading bakery ingredients manufacturer Puratos acquires Vör Foods, a nut-based products producer in Trevose, Pennsylvania.
data.description: In Pennsauken, New Jersey on January 21, 2026, Puratos, a prominent bakery ingredients manufacturer, revealed the purchase of Vör Foods, a rapidly expanding company specializing in ultra clean-label nut butters and nut-based fillings located in Trevose, Pennsylvania. This acquisition bolsters Puratos' portfolio and market presence.

data.title: Mondelēz International partners with Marvel for a unique collaboration, launching MARVEL OREO Stuf of Legends Cookies.
data.description: Marvel and the OREO Brand have joined forces for an unprecedented collaboration: introducing the MARVEL OREO Stuf of Legends Cookies. This innovative partnership was officially announced on 21-Jan-2026 by Mondelēz International through PR Newswire. The company has confirmed amendments to the initial news release.

data.title: Pink Stork Total Prenatal + DHA wins Clean Label Project Purity Award for quality, purity.(ActionEvent date: Jan. 21, 2026/Site: St. Augustine, FL)
data.description: A wellness brand owned by women based in St. Augustine, Florida, recently had their prenatal product recognized for its verified purity and quality standards. Pink Stork revealed that their Total Prenatal + DHA supplement was granted the Clean Label Project Purity Award on January 21, 2026. This award highlights the brand's dedication to producing high-quality products.

data.title: Crypto volatility has historically deterred investors, but changing market response is evolving. In 2025, despite volatility, capital stays on-chain leading to more stability. News article by Benzinga.com.
data.description: The news article discusses the changing perception of cryptocurrency markets from being chaotic and speculative to becoming more like traditional financial markets. In the past, crypto was known for sharp price swings and emotional trading cycles, leading many to view it as more akin to gambling. However, in recent times, there has been a shift in how the market responds to volatility. Instead of panic selling and exiting the market, investors are now more likely to hold onto their assets, shift into stablecoins, rebalance their portfolios, and wait for better entry points. This new behavior suggests that crypto markets are maturing and becoming more stable. This change is attributed to a decrease in retail-driven momentum and an increase in transaction activity and liquidity. Overall, while crypto remains volatile, it is no longer seen as just a speculative market but is evolving into a more structured financial market.

data.title: Qualified Health and Anthropic deploy AI system at University of Texas to expand care access to millions of Texans by analyzing medical records.
data.description: An AI system with population-scale capabilities is utilizing Claude to examine millions of medical records in order to pinpoint patients eligible for guideline-recommended care. This cutting-edge initiative, a collaboration between Qualified Health and Anthropic, leverages advanced technology to facilitate prompt clinical assessments. The development, based in Palo Alto, California, was officially announced on January 21, 2026.

data.title: Envirotech Vehicles reassures shareholders on Nasdaq compliance process, highlights partnership with AZIO AI.
data.description: Houston-based Envirotech Vehicles, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVTV) shared an update on a Nasdaq compliance issue on January 21, 2026. The company emphasized its strong strategic progress and operational collaboration with AZIO AI. This update serves to reassure shareholders amidst the compliance matter and highlights the company's commitment to forward momentum in the market.
U.S. : The 8th Circuit has temporarily lifted the restrictions on ICE imposed last week by Judge Menendez.

data.title: Teachers facing challenges in current educational climate. Mindiful® offers support. Jan. 21, 2026, HOLLYWOOD, Calif._PRNewswire.
data.description: Mindiful® has introduced a new supportive solution tailored for teachers dealing with the challenges of the educational landscape. The initiative comes as teachers in the US and around the world cope with the pressures of a rapidly changing educational sector. Amidst uncertain resources and rising expectations, educators are seeking actionable support. The project is launching from HOLLYWOOD, Calif., with the aim of reaching a significant number of teachers nationally and globally. This initiative addresses the pressing needs of teachers in handling the demands of their profession in the modern age.

data.title: Marty Stuart's Congress of Country Music dedicated Cynthia Lake Building in Mississippi honoring preservationist.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Marty Stuart's Congress of Country Music marked the dedication of the Cynthia Lake Building in Philadelphia, Mississippi. This new building is a tribute to Cynthia Lake, a notable preservationist and philanthropist known for her dedication to music history. The event, attended by numerous guests, highlighted Lake's vision and contributions. This celebration showcased the commitment to preserving music heritage and furthered Stuart's mission.

data.title: Bitcoin starts weak in 2026, but still seen as 'digital gold' due to U.S. political landscape. BTC less speculative, correlating 1.8% while GLD up 10%, SLV 23.7%. Bitcoin mirroring Nasdaq, decoupling from tech, viewed as gold alternative. VanderZanden: Bitcoin responds to math, macro environment, and pricing credibility, not politics. Decoupling trend evident, long-term holders increase.
data.description: Bitcoin is having a slow start this year, but it remains a key player in the digital gold narrative. The cryptocurrency is expected to decouple from tech stocks and be seen as a highly speculative gold alternative with potential for growth. Travis VanderZanden, founder of Buck and CEO of Bird, believes Bitcoin responds to math, not politics, and is gaining credibility as a macro conversation asset. The Grayscale Bitcoin Trust ETF is up 1.8% while SPDR Gold ETF has risen over 10% and iShares Silver Trust fund is up 23.7%. Bitcoin's performance in 2026 is similar to the Nasdaq. The Invesco QQQ Trust ETF is down about 1%. Bitcoin's correlation with the Nasdaq turned negative in 2025 for the first time since.

data.title: Stocks rebound on Trump's remarks after sell-off. Dow rises 0.6%, natural gas jumps 24%. Oil and gas sector outperforms.
data.description: Wall Street saw a modest recovery after the previous day's sell-off due to fears of U.S. tariffs on Europe related to Trump's Greenland stance. Trump reiterated the importance of acquiring Greenland at the World Economic Forum, causing mixed reactions in the market. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 0.6%, outperforming S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100. Denmark rejected negotiation talks over Greenland, and the European Parliament froze EU-U.S. trade agreement discussions, escalating tensions. The oil and gas sector notably performed well, with U.S. natural gas futures rising by almost 24%. LCID stock showed strength. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Former Alameda Research CEO and ex-girlfriend of FTX founder to be freed from federal custody after 440 days.
data.description: Caroline Ellison, ex-CEO of Alameda Research and former partner of FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried, is set to be freed from U.S. federal custody this Wednesday after completing 440 days of a two-year prison term. This information was obtained from Bureau of Prisons data. Ellison is due to leave a transitional facility in New York City after being granted early release for good behavior and entering re-entry custody in October. She was one of many former FTX and Alameda executives who faced legal charges. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sport scandals, a long-standing issue, raise questions on fan response. Cases affect business differently.
data.description: Instances of unethical conduct in the realm of sports have a long history, dating back to the early days of professional competitions. The impact of these breaches on the business side of sports has varied over time. Some incidents have significantly influenced the industry, while others have had little to no effect on the business aspect.
